acceptance_criteria.text: The root cause is documented: generated Template_3 workbooks show blank/0 scene_description because write_template3_report() only looks for the legacy root corrected words file.

proof.summary: Documented the wrong Template_3 transcript path and blank raw cells that appear as 0 through formula references.

acceptance_criteria.text: The Template_3 report path discovers transcript word artifacts in the locations produced by the current TRIBE/hybrid pipeline, with a deterministic preference order.

proof.command: Transcript artifact selection check via python stdin.
proof.summary: Selection prefers tribe_transcript.tsv, supports hybrid corrected words, supports legacy root file, and returns None when missing.

acceptance_criteria.text: scene_description cells in generated workbooks contain transcript snippets aligned to segment timing when transcript words and segment timing are available.

proof.command: Synthetic Template_3 workbook generation with segment timing and transcript words.
proof.summary: Generated raw scene_description cells contain transcript snippets aligned to segment timing.

acceptance_criteria.text: Russian transcript text is preserved as UTF-8 in generated workbooks when the selected transcript artifact contains Russian text.

proof.command: Synthetic workbook generation with Russian UTF-8 transcript words.
proof.summary: Generated workbook preserved Russian strings such as Привет мир, это тест, финал.

acceptance_criteria.text: Existing fallback behavior remains safe: if no transcript artifact is available, report generation still succeeds and leaves scene_description blank rather than failing.

proof.command: Synthetic fallback workbook generation without transcript TSV.
proof.summary: Workbook generation succeeded and left scene_description blank.

acceptance_criteria.text: Focused checks prove Python syntax, transcript artifact selection, workbook generation, and diff hygiene.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: Run transcript artifact selection check for find_template3_words_tsv.
Generate a synthetic Template_3 workbook with Russian tribe_transcript.tsv and inspect 1_RAW_CORRELATIONS!C4:C6.
Generate a synthetic Template_3 workbook without transcript words and inspect 1_RAW_CORRELATIONS!C4.
known_gaps: Excel formula recalculation itself was not evaluated in desktop Excel/LibreOffice; generated workbook cell contents and formulas were inspected structurally.
Russian output depends on the transcript artifact containing Russian text. If the run is configured with target language en, the transcript artifact will contain English corrected text.
